summary: Lead accepts the repaired M7 UX recovery validation for integration after independent QA ACCEPT. The scoped validation now proves the recovered first-screen player UX at 1440x900 and 1280x720, including identity/situation/objective/recommended action, actionable task rail summary, map surface, map legend, and suppressed player-mode debug labels. This acceptance does not approve or reopen formal M7 content lock.

tests_run.result: Lead visually confirmed the smaller viewport now shows player identity/orientation, task rail, map legend, and map surface in the first viewport.
Lead visually confirmed the desktop viewport shows the same recovery evidence with a denser task rail and visible map/legend.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts -g "M7 task rail is first-screen actionable|M7 UX recovery smoke" --project=chromium

tests_run.result: Listed task graph; M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001 is ACCEPTED and M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED.
No READY tasks were printed while content lock remains blocked.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001

tests_run.result: Vite web build completed successfully with the existing non-blocking large chunk warning.
Storybook build completed successfully with existing non-blocking chunk/plugin timing warnings.
Playwright Chromium suite passed: 26 tests, 26 passed.
Format check, lint, typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions.decision: Accept the scoped validation for PR integration after client repair, test R3 REVIEW, and independent QA ACCEPT.
Formal M7 content lock remains a separate product-owner Human Gate; this task does not set content_lock_accepted=true.
The 1280x720 layout is dense but now materially shows the required player-facing evidence and is covered by viewport-area assertions.

risks: Formal content lock still requires explicit product-owner reconsideration through M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001.
1280-class desktop UX may still benefit from later polish, but no longer blocks the validation evidence claim.
requested_action: Run integration gates, push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, then mark M7-UX-RECOVERY-VALIDATION-001 CLOSED only after main contains the accepted changes.
